programs.title: Karamo
programs.sub_title: Unlock: I Went to Jail, You Went Cheating!; Mom, I'm Not Your Online Bully!
programs.desc: While Johnathan was in jail, he says, he and his fiancée, Natasha, agreed to stay faithful, yet he suspects she hasn't kept her promise; Tamertha says she's being bullied online by her own daughter, Teesiah, and she hopes Karamo can help them repair their broken relationship.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Rachel hosts a dinner party featuring a clairvoyant's seance, which emotionally affects Amanda, prompting her to seek Kyle's support; Dorrit believes she does nothing wrong.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: The tension continues at Dorit and Erika's birthday dinner as Kyle is pulled into the middle of Amanda and Dorit's drama. Rachel's tough exterior finally cracks. Sutton is put in the hot seat when Dorit calls her out for not having her back. Boz receives a heartbreaking update on her fertility journey.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Dorit sits down with Mauricio in hopes of breaking through to PK; Sutton gets emotional while opening up to her daughter about her name change.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.sub_title: The Cult's Out of the Bag
programs.desc: Rachel finally gets her wish with a Hot Girl Summer at a Hamptons club. Kyle and Dorit put their problems aside to enjoy the vibe. Boz and Sutton want to get to know the real Amanda, who finally sheds light on a tough time in her past. Erika and Sutton dine with Denise, who opens up about her volatile divorce. Erika stuns the table with a revelation of her own.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Sutton and Jennifer Tilly weigh in on a new, but all-too-familiar woman from Sutton's past; Erika revisits a painful chapter of her life; Boz and Lael travel down to San Diego to visit Keely.
